pr.title: Non-record: 11L Int5 QAT + Score-First TTT — val_bpb 1.1326 (15.51 MB)

output.summary: U-Net stack pairs per-row int5 QAT plus pruning and bigram hash/XSA tweaks with score-first TTT on MLP params for compact 16MB entries.
techniques: Int5 per-row QAT with 15% pruning and extended warmdown
Bigram hash embeddings with full-layer cross-layer shared attention in 11-layer U-Net
Score-first AdamW test-time training on MLP params
